---
title: "Data Quality"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _common import get_conn, resolve_quarter
conn = get_conn()
period = resolve_quarter(conn)  # THIRTEEN_F_QUARTER 환경변수 사용
```

# 정정본 추적

```{python}
#| echo: false
conn.execute(
    """
    SELECT m.label,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_amendment) AS amendments,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE superseded_by IS NOT NULL) AS superseded
    FROM filings f JOIN managers m ON m.cik = f.cik
    GROUP BY m.label
    ORDER BY m.label
    """
).fetchdf()
```

# CUSIP 매핑 실패

```{python}
#| echo: false
n_total = conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cusip_ticker_map").fetchone()[0]
n_null = conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cusip_ticker_map WHERE ticker IS NULL").fetchone()[0]
print(f"전체 CUSIP: {n_total}, 매핑 실패: {n_null} ({n_null*100/n_total:.1f}%)" if n_total else "데이터 없음")
```
